article_meta.title: Democracy Dies in DarknessPoliticsDonald TrumpWhite HouseDemocracy in AmericaCourts & LawNational SecurityElectionsPolit

reasoning: The model identified some genuine author-prose bias (lead framing and loaded term) but committed a notable attribution violation by including quoted spokesperson language in a flagged item and used a questionable Bias by Omission label. It missed a couple of defensible author-level spin instances.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Item 4’s biasedText includes extended quoted DHS spokesperson language; item 3 also embeds quoted terms. Quoted source language should not be part of flagged text.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Two items are solid (lead Slant; 'militarized tactics' Word Choice). One is questionable (Bias by Omission about lack of admin evidence). The Slant-on-placement concept is defensible.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed defensible author-level spin such as the headline/lede phrasing 'raise red flags' and potentially 'mounting public outrage.'
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Labels for Slant and Word Choice are fine. The 'Bias by Omission' label is likely misapplied since an alternative perspective (DHS) is present; critique is more about emphasis than total omission.
